programmes.show_description: Paramedics are called when a woman is flung from her horse, and paramedic Mark and police constable Calum respond to a collision between a car driver and a 13-year-old E-scooter rider.
Stomach complaints keep the Balham Park GPs on their toes, but they suspect that nothing more than chicken nuggets and broccoli are to blame.
Junior Doctor Jake Mullen assesses 44-year old Kay who arrives at the hospital with flu-like symptoms. He runs the risk of contracting a highly contagious strain of flu.
The first episode of the new series features a lipoma so large it may not be safe to tackle under local anaesthetic, and a woman who's had alopecia for over 20 years.
In Surrey, traffic police officers Sean and Ewan stop a farm vehicle with an insecure load and a suspect number plate. In Northamptonshire, Terry reunites a woman with her car. (Ep2)

Paula hunts for a lucky break in Benidorm, animal rescuer Marina has her hands full with a new pup, while expats Danny, Kieron and Gary reflect on their bar ventures.
Val races to prep her Halloween disco, Adrian and Debbie hope their Turaco finds love, Paige performs for care home residents, and Frank makes a big sacrifice for charity.
A battle of wills with an un-Saintly Bernard is causing owner Cody to become isolated from her family. And outbursts from social media star Chihuahua Olive are impacting a couple.
Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston. A teenage driver goes on the rampage in a 7.5 tonne truck, transporting stolen goods.
A hot pursuit gets even hotter when the pursuing car's brakes catch fire. A gadget allows thieves to clone keyfob signals remotely and steal cars without the keys.
On patrol across Derbyshire, the officers tackle a huge variety of crimes, ranging from drunk or drugged driving to catching gangs stealing cars or running drugs across county lines.
Ben Sutcliffe takes presenter Rick Edwards through interceptor training. And Kev Salter goes on drugs busts, accompanied by rookie Pete Tate on two of them.
A collection of some of the most extreme chases the Interceptors have been involved in, including a hot pursuit through a housing estate.
Kev reveals how to spot a drunk driver, before he gets behind a bolshy bandit with no regard for the speed limit, while Jacko follows an all-terrain tearaway.

programmes.show_name: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car...
programmes.show_description: ...Back! Following car recovery companies that are tasked with taking illegal, unroadworthy, untaxed, uninsured vehicles off the road and ensuring their owners pay the penalty. (Ep13)
Remi and Sonny go head-to-head. Has Leah lied to Justin? Holden won't take no for an answer.
Levi's protective over Abigail. Leah gives Holden a serve. Is Lacey in danger?
Dr Chris Pearce meets an anxious vicar who is concerned that a bloodshot eye will prevent him leading a funeral the next day. Reality series filmed at the Balham Park Surgery.
The flow of patients at Barnsley Casualty is relentless and today staff are put under even more pressure by patients suffering from the effects of drink or drugs.
Gross-out romantic comedy starring Cameron Diaz and Ben Stiller. A man hires a detective to find an old date, but the private eye turns out to be a ruthless love rival. (1998)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Gross-out romantic comedy starring Cameron Diaz and Ben Stiller. A man hires a detective to find an old date, but the private eye turns out to be a ruthless love rival. (1998)
Exploring the world of male and female strippers from social media performances to arena tours, including a look at striptease classes and the CCTV used on club premises.
A man dies and his daughter's partner is accused. There was animosity between the men, but did the accused shoot the grandfather of his own child dead - or was it someone else?
Jim intercepts a car containing cannabis, a late-night reveller talks himself into trouble and Sergeant Baxter is confronted by a dishonest driver.
The interceptors stop an uninsured driver with a violent past. Jon Peacock and his dog Brad hunt for suspected burglars. Sarah Capes smells something illegal.
The hunt for a suspected burglar takes an unexpected turn, a late-night stop reveals a bag of drugs and Jon has a tussle with a fallen tree.

Kaye and Graham gamble on half-price breakfasts to revive their bar, Val marks her first anniversary with Richard, and Jojo reflects on her Brit-food delivery venture.
Chip shop owner Caroline races against time to redecorate her business in the heart of Benidorm's old town. But with only a day to complete the task, it's a tough task.
Groomer Marie takes her beloved Pekingese four pack to work - but they're scaring off the furry clientele. And a couple's screaming Frenchie is driving a wedge between them.
Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston. Alex is after two suspects who carried out a violent rampage while on the run.
Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston. In 2017-18, there were 27 fatal police-related road traffic incidents, resulting in 29 fatalities.
Jason stops a drugged-up driver who does 70 mph in a 30 zone to try and evade capture.
Police dog Vader brings down a suspect, Kev and Spike rescue a man from an overturned car, and Pete is forced to pull his taser.
Kev and Pete pursue a car into a farmer's field, Jacko takes part in a major heroin bust, and rookie police dog Elsa chases a runaway burglar through the streets of Middlesbrough.
Interceptor Paul 'the mustard' Faulkner has a close shave with a stolen vehicle, Liam Sewell has a front row seat in a pirouetting pursuit and Spike unearths a bumper crop.

Harper demands answers. Mali steps in to defend a friend. Holden's delusion turns dangerous.
Dr Bower correctly suspects that an innocuous case of pins and needles suggests a more serious condition. Reality series filmed at the Balham Park Surgery.
After having fallen down the stairs the night before, 44-year-old Gavin woke up with a sore neck. He walked himself into A&E.
A new series returns as we follow the brave A&E night-shift teams in Belfast, Newham and Norwich. At Norfolk and Norwich Hospital, a stabbing sends both victim and attacker to A&E.
A 64-year-old man collapses at work with a suspected cardiac arrest, and paramedics rush to help a woman trapped in her car after crashing into a fallen tree.
Two grooms-to-be come to the clinic with lumps they want to get rid of before their big days: Carl has multiple lipomas, while Alan needs a neck cyst removed.
